name: Iron Deficiency Anemia Pattern
english: Low Hemoglobin along with low MCV and MCH may suggest an iron deficiency pattern. Iron studies are recommended.
romanUrdu: Hemoglobin, MCV, aur MCH ka kam hona iron ki kami (Anemia) ki taraf ishara kar sakta hai.

name: Bacterial Infection Pattern
english: Elevated White Blood Cells and Neutrophils often indicate a possible bacterial infection or acute inflammation.
romanUrdu: WBC aur Neutrophils ka zyada hona jism mein bacterial infection ka ishara ho sakta hai.

name: Viral Infection Pattern
english: Elevated White Blood Cells and Lymphocytes may indicate a possible viral infection.
romanUrdu: WBC aur Lymphocytes ka zyada hona viral infection ki taraf ishara kar sakta hai.

name: Dengue-like Pattern
english: Low Platelets combined with low WBC is a pattern often seen in viral infections like Dengue. Urgent doctor review is needed if fever is present.
romanUrdu: Platelets aur WBC ka aik saath kam hona Dengue ya kisi viral infection ka ishara ho sakta hai. Foran doctor ko dikhayein.

name: Long-term Sugar Control Issue
english: Both high Fasting Sugar and high HbA1c suggest a pattern of persistent high blood glucose and potential diabetes risk.
romanUrdu: Fasting Sugar aur HbA1c dono ka zyada hona yeh zahir karta hai ke aapki sugar mustaqil taur par zyada reh rahi hai.

name: Kidney Function Concern
english: High Creatinine along with low eGFR is a strong pattern suggesting reduced kidney filtration capacity.
romanUrdu: Creatinine ka zyada aur eGFR ka kam hona gurdon (kidneys) ki kamzori ka ishara ho sakta hai.

name: Liver Inflammation Pattern
english: Elevation in both ALT and AST markers typically suggests active liver cell inflammation or injury.
romanUrdu: ALT aur AST dono ka zyada hona jiggar (liver) mein sozish ya injury ka ishara ho sakta hai.

name: Hypothyroid Pattern
english: High TSH with low T4 is a classic pattern for primary hypothyroidism (underactive thyroid).
romanUrdu: TSH ka zyada aur T4 ka kam hona sust thyroid (hypothyroidism) ki alamat ho sakti hai.

name: Hyperthyroid Pattern
english: Low TSH with high T4 is a classic pattern for hyperthyroidism (overactive thyroid).
romanUrdu: TSH ka kam aur T4 ka zyada hona teiz thyroid (hyperthyroidism) ki alamat ho sakti hai.

name: UTI Pattern
english: Presence of high Pus Cells and Protein in urine may indicate a possible Urinary Tract Infection (UTI).
romanUrdu: Urine mein Pus Cells aur Protein ka hona infection (UTI) ki taraf ishara kar sakta hai.
